items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a customer joins a waitlist for a fully booked day. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or outcomes related to the waitlist functionality, nor does it confirm whether the system supports this scenario. The linked use case primarily discusses booking an appointment rather than the waitlist feature, leading to an inconclusive assessment.
